case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. VS GUEVARA, NICOLAS A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,208.66 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GUEVARA, NICOLAS A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GUEVARA, NICOLAS A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUEVARA, NICOLAS A. $927.75 PRINCIPAL, $59.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $987.54 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $118.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED AS TO DEFENDANT GUEVARA, NICOLAS A.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GUEVARA, NICOLAS A.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $959.72 AS TO DEFENDANT GUEVARA, NICOLAS A.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GUEVARA, NICOLAS A.
